goal: Build a multi-camera triangulation station: 3 cameras at different angles produce per-cube depth via stereo + monocular fusion. Realizes Phase 9 yrkesroll #11 (perception engineer persona).
thoughts: 3 cameras: front-top, left-side, right-side. Each emits images + depth.
Triangulation post-process (offline) fuses 3 views to compute world-frame cube center with sub-cm precision.
Pick-place runs concurrently — robot needs perception to decide which cube to pick.
For V0: 1 cube; cameras log frames; post-processing is offline; pick-place still uses USD-direct cube_position.
Function-gate: standard pick-place delivery. Multi-camera artifact = perception data files.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", prim_type="Cube", position=[0.4, 0.2, 0.835], size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=["/World/Cube_1"],
    attr="physxRigidBody:solverPositionIterationCount",
    value=16,
)

create_bin(prim_path="/World/Bin", position=[-0.4, 0, 0.75], size=[0.30, 0.30, 0.15])

configure_camera(
    camera_path="/World/CamFront",
    position=[0.4, 0.2, 1.30],
    look_at=[0.4, 0.2, 0.78],
    fov=60,
)

configure_camera(
    camera_path="/World/CamLeft",
    position=[0.0, 0.6, 0.95],
    look_at=[0.4, 0.2, 0.83],
    fov=70,
)

configure_camera(
    camera_path="/World/CamRight",
    position=[0.8, 0.6, 0.95],
    look_at=[0.4, 0.2, 0.83],
    fov=70,
)

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.2, 0.835], size=[0.10, 0.10, 0.06])

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path=None,
    source_paths=["/World/Cube_1"],
    destination_path="/World/Bin",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/Bin"],
)
extension_notes: Perception canonical. Multi-camera scene scaffold. Triangulation fusion is offline post-processing — not invoked from canonical itself.
failure_modes: Cameras at occlusion-prone angles miss cube during transit (left/right cams may see only robot arm)
configure_camera signature varies; some Isaac Sim builds expect target_path or rotation instead of look_at
Pick-place uses USD direct lookup, not vision triangulation — gate doesn't validate triangulation output
